title: Add formatHelpers utility module with formatBytes, truncateMiddle, and slugify
description: Create a new utility module `src/utils/formatHelpers.ts` with three functions: `formatBytes` to convert bytes to human-readable format (KB, MB, GB), `truncateMiddle` to truncate strings with ellipsis in the middle, and `slugify` to convert text to URL-safe slugs. Include full TypeScript types, JSDoc comments, and co-located tests in `src/utils/formatHelpers.test.ts` covering all edge cases. Note: `slugify` already exists at `src/utils/slugify.ts` and should be reused/imported rather than duplicated.
existing_patterns: src/utils/slugify.ts - existing slugify implementation to reuse/import
src/utils/truncate.ts - existing truncate pattern for reference
src/utils/format-date.ts - JSDoc style and typed exports pattern
src/utils/*.test.ts - co-located test files using vitest
